org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml

Class GMLReader

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorReader
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLToolReader
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.gml.GMLReader
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    GMLConstants, NetEditorReader

    public class GMLReader
extends AbstractXMLToolReader
implements GMLConstants
    This class permits to read the graph-model into the GML format.

    Graph Modelling Language (GML) is a hierarchical ASCII-based file format for describing graphs. It has been also named Graph Meta Language.

    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    See Also:
    "http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Graph_Modelling_Language"
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

    • Method Detail

      • getContentType

        public final NetEditorContentType getContentType()
        Description copied from interface: NetEditorReader
        Replies the type of the last read content by this reader.
        Specified by:
        getContentType in interface NetEditorReader
        Returns:
        the type, or null if unknown.

      • read

        public final <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> G read(Class<G> type,
                                File inputFile,
                                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> figures)
                                    throws IOException
        Description copied from interface: NetEditorReader
        Read the specified input stream as a XML file, and extract a graph model and its associated figures.
        Specified by:
        read in interface NetEditorReader
        Type Parameters:
        G - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        Parameters:
        type - is the expected type of the graph to read from the stream.
        inputFile - is the file to read.
        figures - is the collection of figures that were read from the input stream, from the front to the background.
        Returns:
        the graph read from the input stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • extractType

        protected String extractType(Element node)
                      throws IOException
        Description copied from class: AbstractXMLToolReader
        Extract the type of the specified node as a string.
        Specified by:
        extractType in class AbstractXMLToolReader
        Parameters:

        Returns:
